ari | consideration contract

This contract is a negotiated agreement, hosted online to enable Daddy and babygirl to express their thoughts and desires and vision for the future and to detail, discuss, and refine until it is mutually agreeable, finalized, and then signed for a selected term. It is intended to create a unified understanding of a starting point, but with the understanding that the dynamic will evolve, and that other documents such as rules, mantras, etc., as well as blog posts from both daddy and babygirl will continue to drive the dynamic forward with deeper understanding and communication on new topics beyond this starting point.

​

Major changes in the structure of the dynamic will need to be added to this document as addendums.

​

This document assumes and incorporates by reference both daddy’s treatise on what it means to be his as well as his manual. Where any part of those documents is not accepted, or is accepted with some modifications, those exceptions or changes must be noted here.

​

Many sections have been copied from various contract examples and parts have been left in to make sure they are considered, not just removed because Daddy's not interested or doesn't care about certain things. This document starts as a draft that is meant to be edited and adjusted together until it is (hopefully) in a final state desirable to both of us.

Questions this Contract needs to Answer

Many questions may not have been completely answered or adjusted to match our exact dynamic in development, additional thought and conversation will be needed. As you review the contract after this section, and make comments, or edits, and we go back and forth, when you feel that a question has been completely addressed/answered, check it off. If as you reflect, you realize you want or need additional clarification, uncheck any questions that need to stay open for further exploration.

​

This section exists purely to make sure the contract (which starts after this section) is thorough and complete. This is not the contract itself. Checking a question off just means that it has been addressed in the contract below, as best we can tell when it is checked. 

​

When all questions have been checked off, the contract is probably ready. Keep in mind that some questions may be addressed in either Daddy’s treatise on what it means to be His or in his manual to Daddy.

​

Jay Wiseman, the author of definitive BDSM guidebook “SM 101,” proposes the following as the minimum topics a BDSM contract should address:

​

Who participates
Who plays which role (and titles used)
Where scenes happen
Time of scene
Agreement to accidents that may happen during a scene
Limits – hard, soft, physical and emotional
Whether sex or sexual contact is allowed
If intoxication is allowed
Who will be bound and the tightness of the binding
What type or amount of pain babygirl prefers
Whether it’s okay to leave marks
If humiliation is allowed
Safe word
Fantasies babygirl wants to try
Aftercare protocol
Any other thoughts

Questions

  • Who does this contract involve and what are their roles?
  • When is this contract effective and for how long? (e.g. 1 week, 1 month, 3 months, a year, or longer?)
  • What is the scope of the relationship and the dynamic?
    • Do the same rules and roles apply outside the bedroom as within?
    • Are there areas of life that babygirl is keeping off limits from daddy’s involvement, like work, or family, or finances?
    • how can Daddy support babygirl with work and career, what is her desired level of his involvement, and what is his level of control in these arenas?
  • Is the D/s complete and total?
    • How much freedom does babygirl have or is the submission and power exchange complete and non-negotiable?
    • What exceptions exist?
    • Will there be exceptions for:
      • Family obligations
      • Professional obligations
      • Physical safety
      • Mental health considerations
      • Financial control
      • Legal obligations
      • Moral and religious obligations
  • Who benefits from this contract and how?
    • Is it mutually beneficial for both?
      • Or is it solely for the benefit for Daddy?
    • If babygirl benefits, in what ways? (In reality, a relationship that doesn't benefit both parties will not last long.)
    • What are Daddy's needs and expectations from babygirl?
      • What services is babygirl expected to supply?
      • Will babygirl be expected follow a program of physical improvement through diet and exercise such as a program of Kegel exercises, yoga, weight-lifting, or aerobics?
        • Through cosmetic surgery?
        • Through laser hair removal?
      • Will babygirl be expected to know or learn and special skills or knowledge (such as boot blacking or gourmet cooking or boxing)? 
      • How does Daddy like to be addressed?
      • Are there any special written or spoken conventions that Daddy expects babygirl to follow?
      • Can Daddy inflict pain or humiliation on babygirl for no other reason than it pleases him (spankings, rough sex, or more)?
    • What are babygirl's needs and expectations from Daddy? (Never assume this goes without saying.)
      • What are his responsibilities to babygirl?
      • Is Daddy expected to safeguard the well being of babygirl?
        • How so?
      • Will Daddy train babygirl?
        • And if so, what will the training entail?
        • If not, how shall babygirl know how to please Daddy?
      • Does Daddy have any obligation to please babygirl?
        • In what way?
      • Does babygirl expect Daddy to play with babygirl?
        • How often?
        • What sort of play?
  • What are the limits?
    • May babygirl have privacy?
      • Daddy may record any and all interactions?
    • May babygirl own property?
    • May babygirl own stock, an IRA, or 401(k)?
    • If babygirl must dispose of all personal property, what is the value of babygirl's personal estate before the contract takes effect?
    • Free use (Blanket consent)?
  • Do both parties share finances?
    • Does Daddy control and own all finances including babygirl's income?
  • Will this contract entail sex?
    • How is this sex defined?
    • Does it include "cyber sex?"
    • Does it include "oral sex?"
    • Is the sex exclusive?
    • Will babygirl be expected to perform sex with people of the opposite gender or the same gender?
    • Is Daddy free to have sex outside the relationship?
    • May babygirl have sex outside the relationship?
  • Will this relationship be exclusive or are there other partners, spouse, or lovers involved?
    • What are their expectations?
  • When will these roles be in effect?
    • All the time (24/7)?
    • After work?
    • On weekends only?
  • Where will this take place?
    • Is it a long distance relationship?
    • Is it a cyber relationship?
    • Will Daddy and babygirl live together?
    • If they plan to move in together, when and where?
  • How private or public is this relationship?
    • Are either or both parties "out?"
    • Do their families know?
    • Will the same protocols be observed in public and in private? (Is it acceptable to "scare the vanillas?")
    • Will the protocols be observed when visiting relatives or friends or attending office parties?
  • Will the relationship involve imposed consequences/punishment? 
    • Under what situations?
    • What will the punishment entail?
    • Will the punishment be mutually enjoyable? (i.e. Will the "punishment" be play?)
    • Or will the punish serve as a deterrent?
  • When and under what circumstances can babygirl have permission to speak freely?
    • May babygirl voice a personal opinion without consulting Daddy?
    • May babygirl disagree with Daddy either in public or in private?
    • May babygirl warn Daddy that Daddy is in error?
    • May babygirl disobey Daddy when it is in Daddy's best interest? (i.e. If Daddy orders babygirl to do something that babygirl is convinced will harm or embarrass Daddy, must babygirl obey the order?)
  • Under what conditions can either party cancel this contract?
  • How may babygirl petition for release?
  • What are the expectations for both parties on how to handle the breakup?
  • If babygirl has made financial sacrifices, is Daddy obliged to compensate babygirl?
  • How shall they interact with each other after the contract is voided or not renewed?

Contract

Purpose and Fundamentals

The fundamental purpose of this contract is to allow babygirl to explore her sensuality and her limits safely, experience personal growth, and develop in her career and all of life, with due respect and regard for her needs, her limits, and her wellbeing. 

​

Daddy and babygirl agree and acknowledge that all that occurs under the terms of this contract will be consensual, completely confidential between the two of them, and subject to the agreed limits and safety procedures set out in this contract. Additional limits and safety procedures may be agreed in writing, in physical or electronic form, or incorporated by reference in their respective blogs or other documents shared with each other.

​

Daddy and babygirl each warrant that they suffer from no sexual, serious, infectious or life-threatening illnesses including but not limited to HIV, Herpes, Hepatitis, and HPV. If during the Term (as defined below) or any extended term of this contract either party should be diagnosed with or become aware of any such illness he or she undertakes to inform the other immediately and in any event prior to any form of physical contact between the parties. 

​

Adherence to the above warranties, agreements and undertakings (and any additional limits and safety procedures agreed herein) are fundamental to this contract. Any breach shall render it void with immediate effect and each party agrees to be fully responsible to the other for the consequence of any breach.

​

Everything in this contract must be read and interpreted in the light of the fundamental purpose and the fundamental terms set out in this section.

Commencement and Term

Daddy and babygirl enter into this contract on the commencement date fully aware of its nature and undertake to abide by its conditions without exception.

​

This contract shall be effective starting on ____________ and continue indefinitely until and unless either party chooses to exercise the termination clause for any reason.

Availability 

  • babygirl will make herself available to the Daddy from __________ through to _________ each week during the Term at times to be specified by Daddy (“the Allotted Times”). Further allocated time can be mutually agreed on an ad hoc basis.
  • Daddy reserves the right to dismiss babygirl from his service at any time and for any reason. babygirl may request her release at any time, such request to be granted with the return of Daddy’s collar.

Location 

babygirl will make herself available during the Allotted Times and agreed additional times at locations to be determined by Daddy. Daddy will ensure that all travel costs incurred by babygirl for that purpose are met by Daddy.

Service Provisions 

The following service provisions have been discussed and agreed and will be adhered to by both parties during the Term. Both parties accept that certain matters may arise which are not covered by the terms of this contract or the service provisions, or that certain matters may be renegotiated. In such circumstance further clauses may be proposed by way of amendment. Any further clauses or amendments must be agreed, documented and signed by both parties and shall be subject to the terms set out in the Purpose and Fundamentals above.

Daddy 

  • Daddy shall make babygirl’s health and safety a priority at all times. Daddy shall not at any time require, request, allow or demand babygirl to participate at the hands of Daddy in the hard limits detailed in this contract or in any act that either party deems to be unsafe. Daddy will not undertake or permit to be undertaken any action which could cause serious injury or any risk to babygirl’s life.
  • Daddy accepts babygirl as his, to own, control, dominate and discipline during the Term agreed. Daddy may use babygirl’s body at any time during the Allotted Times or any agreed additional times in any manner he deems fit, sexually or otherwise. 
  • Daddy shall provide babygirl with all necessary training and guidance in how to properly serve Daddy. 
  • Daddy shall maintain a stable and safe environment in which babygirl may perform her duties in service of Daddy. 
  • Daddy may discipline babygirl as necessary to ensure babygirl fully appreciates her role of subservience to Daddy and to discourage unacceptable conduct. Daddy may flog, spank, whip or corporally punish babygirl as he sees fit, for purposes of correction and discipline, for his own personal enjoyment, or for any other reason, which he is not obliged to provide.  
  • In training and in the administration of discipline, Daddy shall ensure that no permanent marks are made upon babygirl’s body nor any injuries incurred that may require medical attention, nor any permanent damage or changes made to babygirl’s body.
  • In training and in the administration of discipline Daddy shall ensure that the discipline and the instruments used for the purposes of discipline are safe, shall not be used in such a way as to cause serious harm and shall not in any way exceed the limits defined and detailed in this contract.
  • In case of illness or injury Daddy shall care for babygirl, seeing to her health and safety, encouraging and when necessary ordering medical attention when it is judged necessary by Daddy. 
  • Daddy shall maintain his own good health and seek medical attention when necessary in order to maintain a risk-free environment 
  • Daddy shall not loan babygirl to another Dominant without explicit agreement from babygirl.
  • Daddy may restrain, handcuff, or bind babygirl at any time during the Allotted Times or any agreed additional times for any reason and for extended periods of time, giving due regard to the health and safety of babygirl. 
  • Daddy will ensure that all equipment used for the purposes of training and discipline shall be maintained in a clean, hygienic and safe state at all times.

babygirl 

  • babygirl accepts Daddy as her owner, with the understanding that she is now the property of Daddy, to be dealt with as Daddy pleases during the Term generally but specifically during the Allotted Times and any additional agreed allotted times. 
  • babygirl shall obey the rules as Daddy sets out in both this document and the separate Rules and Rituals document that Daddy will maintain.
  • babygirl shall serve Daddy in any way Daddy sees fit and shall endeavor to please Daddy at all times to the best of her ability. 
  • babygirl shall take all measures necessary to maintain her good health and shall request or seek medical attention whenever it is needed, keeping Daddy informed at all times of any health issues that may arise. 
  • babygirl will ensure that she procures oral contraception or equivalent and ensure that she takes it as and when prescribed to prevent any pregnancy unless she is otherwise unable to conceive.
  • babygirl shall accept without question any and all disciplinary actions deemed necessary by Daddy and remember her status and role in regard to Daddy at all times. 
  • babygirl shall not touch or pleasure herself sexually without permission from Daddy. 
  • babygirl shall not cum without permission from Daddy and if she fails to keep from cumming, she will immediately ruin the orgasm by removing her hands and all other stimulation immediately and holding her legs as open as possible, hips arched into the air until the orgasm passes.
  • babygirl shall submit to any sexual activity demanded by Daddy and shall do without hesitation or argument unless Daddy demands something that has already been negotiated as a hard or soft limit.
  • babygirl shall accept whippings, floggings, spankings, caning, paddling or any other discipline Daddy should decide to administer, without hesitation, enquiry or complaint. 
  • babygirl shall maintain a cooperative and respectful bearing in the presence of Daddy. 
  • babygirl shall always conduct herself in a respectful manner to Daddy and shall address him only as Daddy, Sir, Mr. , or such other title as Daddy may direct, unless calling for a meta conversation either implicitly or explicitly.
  • babygirl will not touch Daddy without his express permission to do so.

Activities 

  • babygirl shall not participate in activities or any sexual acts that either party deems to be unsafe or any activities detailed in the hard limits in this document, with Daddy or with any other person. 
  • Daddy and babygirl have discussed the activities set out in BDSM Survey of Limits and Interests and recorded in writing their agreement with respect to them.

Safewords & Gestures

  • Daddy and babygirl recognize that Daddy may make demands of babygirl that cannot be met without incurring physical, mental, emotional, spiritual, or other harm at the time the demands are made to babygirl. In such circumstances related to this, babygirl may make use of a safeword (“The Safeword (s)”). Two Safewords will be invoked depending on the severity of the demands. 
  • The Safeword “Yellow” will be used to bring to the attention of Daddy that babygirl is close to her limit of endurance. 
  • The Safeword “Red” will be used to bring to the attention of Daddy that babygirl cannot tolerate any further demands. When this word is said Daddy’s action will cease completely with immediate effect.
  • If babygirl is gagged or otherwise unable to verbalize her safeword, two short gestures will indicate “yellow” and three short gestures will indicate “red”.

Roles

Daddy will take responsibility for the wellbeing and the proper training, guidance, ongoing education, skills development, correction, instruction, and discipline of babygirl. He shall decide the nature of such training, guidance, development, correction, and discipline and the time and place of its administration, subject to the agreed terms, limitations and safety procedures set out in this contract or agreed additionally above.

​

If at any time Daddy should fail to keep to the agreed terms, limitations and safety procedures set out in this contract or agreed additionally above babygirl is entitled to terminate this contract forthwith and to leave Daddy's service without notice.

​

Subject to that proviso and to Purpose and Fundamentals above babygirl is to serve and obey Daddy in all things. Subject to the agreed terms, limitations and safety procedures set out in this contract or agreed additionally under Purpose and Fundamentals above she shall without query or hesitation offer Daddy such pleasure as he may require and she shall accept without query or hesitation his training, guidance, instruction, correction, and discipline in whatever form it may take.

General Rules

  • babygirl agrees to obey her Daddy in all respects. her mind, body, heart and time belong to Him. babygirl will obey any instructions given by Daddy immediately without hesitation or reservation and in an expeditious manner. babygirl will agree to any sexual activity deemed fit and pleasurable by Daddy excepting those activities which are outlined in the BDSM Survey of Limits and Interests below. She will do so eagerly and without hesitation.
  • babygirl agrees that as a submissive, she will always show respect even in meta conversations. Disrespect is a serious offense, and it will have consequences. Respect includes manner of speech, promptness, kneeling to serve (when able), proper answers, obedience, and wholehearted honesty.
  • babygirl accepts the responsibility of using her safeword when necessary, and trusts implicitly in her Daddy to respect the use of that safeword. If a condition arises in which babygirl needs to use the safeword or gesture, her Daddy will assess the situation, and determine an appropriate course of action.
  • babygirl shall keep her body available and in her best possible health, fitness, and appearance for the use of her Daddy at all times. In addition, babygirl agrees that her Daddy possesses the right to determine whether others can use her body and what use they may put it to. Daddy will discuss all such instances in advance with babygirl, to be certain that such play with others will not violate any established limits. 
  • babygirl shall demonstrate her acceptance of her role of service and availability at all times while at home and at other times and places specified by her Daddy. babygirl acknowledges that her Daddy may use her body or mind in any manner He wishes within the parameters of safety and negotiated limits. He may cause her to experience pain or pleasure without giving a reason, just to please Himself. babygirl enjoys the right to cry, scream, or beg, but accepts the fact that these heartfelt expressions will not affect her treatment. Further, she accepts that if her Daddy tires of her noise, he may gag her or take other actions to silence her.
  • babygirl will answer any questions put to her honestly and directly, and will do her best to volunteer any information her Daddy should know about her physical or emotional condition in a timely fashion, before Daddy makes decisions that would be affected by said information. While her Daddy expects His babygirl to speak honestly and forthrightly about anything that bothers her, she is not to interpret that as permission to whine or complain. she will phrase her concerns politely and respectfully, and then gracefully accept her Daddy's judgment in these matters without further complaint.
  • babygirl will always speak of her Daddy in terms of love and respect. She will address Him at all times as either "Daddy" or "Sir" barring explicit exceptions made in this contract (see Public Rules of Conduct).
  • Daddy may give the babygirl "free periods" in His presence during which babygirl may express herself openly and freely. There will be no punishments applied during "free periods." It is understood, however, that babygirl will continue to address her Daddy with respect and love at all times and that deviations from this rule are subject to punishment at a later time. babygirl may also call for a meta conversation to suspend the dynamic at will, with the same stipulations.
  • babygirl will not enter into any sexual relations with anyone other than Daddy without permission or direction from Daddy. babygirl will conduct herself in a respectful and modest manner at all times. She must recognize that her behavior is a direct reflection on Daddy. She shall be held accountable for any misdeeds, wrongdoings and misbehavior committed even when not in the presence of Daddy. 
  • babygirl agrees that consequences, even severe ones, may be assessed for any infraction of the letter or spirit of their contract, and will accept the correction gratefully and gracefully. The form and extent of the punishment shall be at Daddy's discretion and pleasure, and Daddy shall make it clear to babygirl in advance that she is receiving a consequence for her choices and behavior when a consequence occurs. Daddy shall endeavor not to inflict physical harm upon babygirl that might require the attention of anyone outside the relationship. Daddy and babygirl agree that in extremes either may activate a free period by using the safeword. The free period will continue until both parties agree that the problem(s) concerned are resolved.
  • babygirl is permitted to engage in any and all activities not actively forbidden by their contract or by later edict of Daddy. All rights and privileges not otherwise noted in this contract belong to Daddy, and He may exercise them as He chooses.
  • babygirl may disobey Daddy when she is genuinely convinced it is in Daddy's best interest, i.e., if Daddy orders babygirl to do something that babygirl is convinced will harm or embarrass Daddy, babygirl may safeword or call for meta conversation or refer to Daddy by his given name to pause the dynamic, but is not required to obey the order.
  • babygirl agrees that Daddy is more important than any other activity she may be engaged in, except for immediate child care needs or emergency medical needs.
  • babygirl will sit, stand, walk, kneel, and lay where, when, and how Daddy desires.

Code of Conduct

Duties of Servitude

  • Above all, babygirl’s primary duty is to please and seduce Daddy.
  • Personal Duties: Attend to Daddy’s physical and emotional needs, behave as his sexual plaything, offer physical comfort, act in obedience, remain honest and loyal, and wait on Daddy as desired.
  • Household Duties: As negotiated with Daddy, and as the privilege of service is earned, babygirl may request, and with permission, handle any and all of the following or more: cleaning and maintaining the home, laundry, shopping, cooking, baking, and running all errands as needed. Any task or duty assigned should be considered permanent until further notice. Tasks may be added at any time.

PRivacy

  • Due to the unconventional aspects of these lifestyles (DD/lg and poly), family, friends, business partners, clients, customers, subcontractors, and the general public can have significantly shocked and/or negative reactions to being made aware of babygirl and/or Daddy’s involvement, let alone any details of their lifestyle.
  • babygirl will not share details of this contract or of any other documents Daddy creates and shares with her, of the lifestyle and dynamic she is building with Daddy, or any intimate details of her experiences with Daddy with anyone else, including other babygirls, without first discussing the possibility with Daddy and coming to agreement with him on how much to share and how to share anything. This is for both babygirl and Daddy’s protection and the protection of the relationship and life they are building together.
  • babygirl will work with Daddy to decide how to represent their relationship to others, whether to present Daddy as boyfriend, friend with benefits, lover, significant other, etc. as well as how to explain how we met and/or came to have a relationship.
  • babygirl will not out herself or Daddy by advocating for poly, D/s, or age gap relationships to others without prior conversation and approval from Daddy. this means that if she is inadvertently pulled into such conversations, she is to remain neutral if not be agreeable with negative comments regarding any and all of the above.

Private Rules of Conduct

  • When Daddy visits or comes home to babygirl, babygirl will greet Him wearing His provided marks of ownership and an approved home outfit. She will wear no underclothes in His presence unless given permission. 
  • On days when Daddy is home with babygirl, babygirl will wear whatever is deemed appropriate by her Daddy. 
  • When in the same room as her Daddy, babygirl will ask permission before leaving the room, explain where she is going, and why. 
  • When speaking to her Daddy or being spoken to by Him, babygirl will assume a demeanor of alert attention and will meet her Daddy's eyes directly, unless instructed to do otherwise.

Daddy will incrementally add to private rules of conduct as he develops the dynamic with babygirl, often by posting a blog post tagged with #home and #rules. Additional rules will be collected into a Rules & Rituals document by Daddy as they are added.

Public Rules of Conduct

babygirl will conduct herself at all times in such a manner as to not call negative or excessive attention to Daddy and babygirl.

  • she will call her Daddy by His name only if the use of "Daddy" is inappropriate.
  • babygirl will defer to her Daddy in public.
  • babygirl will remain within Daddy's eyesight unless permission is given to do otherwise.
  • babygirl will be courteous and prompt at all times.
  • babygirl will not argue with Daddy or others or complain in public.
  • babygirl may dress herself, but must seek approval of any clothing she wishes to wear in public. babygirl will do her best to always appear put together in any social setting where she represents Daddy.
  • Unless specifically stated otherwise, babygirl may not wear panties.

Work Rules of Conduct

No part of their agreement is intended to interfere with babygirl's career. Daddy wishes babygirl to work hard and honestly, to do her best to excel, in general to conduct herself in a manner calculated to bring honor and respect to them both. During periods of work, babygirl is permitted to schedule appointments, to dress in a manner appropriate to work (see Clothing: At Work), and to leave the house when necessary. During periods of work, babygirl may answer the telephone and discuss business without the expressed permission of her Daddy.

Marks of Ownership

Tattoos

As part of her formal acceptance of her Daddy's ownership, babygirl will be tattooed with either “Daddy's” or “MY DADDY WILL KILL YOU” or something similar on her mons pubis, and in ornate text, “baby” on the back of her left thigh, and “girl” on the back of her right thigh, potentially mixed into a garter tattoo that goes all the way around her thigh or thighs, or a similar garter tattoo, and other tattoos as chosen by Daddy or planned in collaboration with Daddy.

Piercings

As part of her formal acceptance of her Daddy's ownership, babygirl will be pierced in both nipples, her navel, and receive a vertical clit hood piercing. After her piercings heal, her Daddy will select the jewelry she is to wear and will change it as He desires, from time to time. babygirl will never remove her body jewelry without permission.

​

A schedule for her piercings will be worked out between her and Daddy.

​

Daddy prefers piercings to be done with Daddy present, as piercings are intended to be special and private, for Daddy, not for the world or girlfriends. This doesn't mean that you don't share that you got them at all. You are not prohibited to share, but contemplate keeping them as something special between you and daddy, not just announced or shared with everyone in your life.

Collar

When babygirl has finalized her contract with Daddy, her Daddy will collar her. babygirl and Daddy will plan a collaring and contract signing ceremony together beforehand.

​

babygirl acknowledges that she is in training mode and under consideration for a permanent collar, if she so desires, and therefore will be required to wear a training & consideration collar for the duration of this Contract. At the end of the Contract term, if the parties renew the Contract, or at any appropriate point if the Contract term is indefinite, if Daddy feels babygirl has earned a formal, permanent collar, and babygirl desires to be permanently collared by Daddy, Daddy may present her with a permanent collar.

​

While babygirl continues to wear Daddy’s collar, she visibly indicates her alignment with this contract, and it confirms her full, active, enthusiastic, and continuous consent to Daddy’s free use of her body within the negotiated limits in this Contract as well as posts made to her blog indicating her evolution on any hard or soft limits.

​

Note: collars that may be damaged by water may be taken off during showers, baths, swimming, very sweaty exercise, etc. as long as promptly put back on afterwards.

Plug

Daddy will provide a set of plugs for babygirl to wear, starting at 2 hours a day and increasing by 2 hours every week until babygirl is wearing her plug at all times, including while she sleeps. babygirl will not be required to stay plugged if she is sick or during her cycle, or when given permission or direction by Daddy to go without.

Lush

Daddy will provide a Lovense Lush or similar toy that babygirl will wear, starting with 6 hours a day and increasing by 2 hours every week until babygirl is wearing her Lush at all times, including while she sleeps. babygirl will let Daddy know whenever Lush is recharging and when Lush is back home inside of babygirl. babygirl will not be required to have Lush inside her if she is sick or during her cycle.

Writing

Daddy will, on occasion, as he chooses, write “dirty” nicknames or messages on babygirl’s body using temporary tattoo pens. Writing will be in areas that are covered by work clothes.

Play

Daddy will often leave and/or refresh marks on babygirl’s body including hickies, bruises from rough play (like fingerprint marks from strong grip), as well as marks from spankings, flogging, crop, etc. during a play session. 

Other

Daddy may add other marks of ownership as he finds or considers additional ones for a fit for his dynamic with babygirl.

Clothing Rules

Any removable item worn on babygirl's body is considered clothing for the purposes of this contract. babygirl is to live aware of her submission through how she dresses as 

well as constantly seducing Daddy through her appearance and clothing.

​

babygirl is allowed 1 layer of fabric over any body part, ever, except with permission. decorative underwear, that don’t actually cover, do not count as a layer. similarly, mostly transparent or translucent clothing does not count as a layer. this includes bras that support but do not cover her nipples.

​

babygirl is also limited to two items of clothing at a time unless given permission for an exception. again, purely decorative underwear that don’t actually cover anything, as well as transparent or translucent items of clothing do not count towards this limit.

​

Daddy may override any of these rules in the moment as the mood takes him.

​

During the term of this contract, babygirl will wear clothing only approved by Daddy. Daddy may provide a clothing budget for babygirl, which babygirl shall utilize. Daddy shall accompany babygirl to purchase clothing on an ad hoc basis. If Daddy so requires, babygirl shall, during the term, wear adornments Daddy shall require, in the presence of Daddy and any other time Daddy deems fit.

Collars

babygirl will be provided with a day collar by her Daddy for wear during at work, at school, or in any environment that requires a professional image to be maintained.

​

Daddy will provide a full-time collar to wear at all other times, unless the day collar is close enough to a true collar to serve at all times.

​

Daddy may place a play collar on babygirl during play sessions, as well.

Jewelry

  • babygirl may add a single tiny diamond nose stud on either side of her nose to wear at all times
  • babygirl may wear her current nose piercing jewelry or similar until/unless renegotiated with daddy.
  • babygirl must wear one of the following earring types at all times except when sleeping or if not allowed at work:
    • at least 1” long, sparkling, dangling earrings that swing with each step
    • hoops at least 1.5” in diameter
    • a diamond stud
  • Daddy will look for options compatible with babygirl’s earlobes.

Plug

Daddy will provide an assortment of plugs for babygirl to use both for training as well as to wear. As babygirl makes progress in her training, she will move up to primarily wearing larger plugs. Daddy will provide direction on living plugged including a go-bag to keep with her while away from home.

At home

babygirl must never wear true underwear, ever, under other clothes at home. she may wear them as clothing, an only layer, at home with Daddy. during colder weather, she must wear warmer sweaters, leggings, stockings, long dresses or skirts, but not actual underwear, without permission.

​

Approved, example outfits (more will always be added on daddy’s blog)

  • stockings and a t-shirt or one of Daddy's shirts
  • bra and panties set
  • plug and belly chain
  • short shorts with loose top

Daddy may allow use of a bathrobe or other warm layer over her regular home attire, while at home, if there is company or due to the temperature in the home.

In Public

Public outfits are intended to keep babygirl in a constant state of awareness that she is owned and not able to be completely covered because she is obeying Daddy.

​

Approved, example outfits, as appropriate depending on season

  • short dress with no underwear (must not cover your knees)
  • jeans or yoga pants with no underwear
  • short skirt that flashes when you bend over
  • tops that show plenty of cleavage
  • loose, soft, oversized boat-neck tops
  • any top that bares some midriff

The goal is to draw attention without looking actually slutty.

At Work/School

The In Public rules and examples apply with the exception of being allowed to wear a bra, unless babygirl’s work environment requires a more professional standard, in which case Daddy will work with babygirl to define her work look and wardrobe to remain classy and professional while still playing with the line of creating attraction and drawing attention.

Dinners/Formal Events

Daddy will provide dresses or other outfits, or select from babygirl’s wardrobe, clothing designed to show babygirl off as well as to give Daddy access to play with her while out in public, including babygirl easily flashing daddy spontaneously or as commanded by Daddy.

Grooming, Health, & Hygiene Rules

Hair

  • babygirl will grow her hair out and keep it long, all one length with no bangs
  • babygirl will keep her hair at least long enough to cover her breasts but not so long it reaches past her waist while standing

grooming

  • babygirl will shave or wax to stay sleek, smooth and hairless below the neck (except for an optional vertical landing strip no more than .5“ wide)
  • Daddy and babygirl will laser hair removal options as appropriate to her hair color
  • babygirl will maintain a french manicure on her fingernails unless given permission to play with another look

Cleanliness

  • babygirl will shower or bathe daily

Vitamins, Water, Food

  • babygirl will follow Daddy’s instructions in his babygirl Health document

vIces

  • No cigarettes except as Daddy allows socially
  • No recreational drugs unless negotiated with Daddy on a case by case basis
  • No more than 1 glass of wine, or 1 beer, or 1 shot a day without permission
  • No soft drinks without permission
  • No putting herself in any unnecessary danger

Sleep

Except by permission from Daddy, babygirl will get enough, but not too much sleep.

  • she will get up by 8 AM at the latest except by explicit permission from Daddy
    • on days where she starts work at 10, she will get up by 1 hour before work
    • after completing (3) 12-hour shifts, she may sleep in to 10 the next day
  • she will get between 7 and 8 hours of sleep every night except by permission from Daddy

Sexual Health

Daddy prefers to be fluid bonded with his babygirls, and typically will not accept a long-term physically intimate dynamic with prophylactic or disease barriers such as condoms or dams.

​

This means that a high degree of trust is required, because it is not only babygirl’s own health that is put at risk if she engages in sexual intimacy outside of the constellation of Daddy and his babygirls, but it is also Daddy and all other babygirls that are put at risk.

​

Here are several key considerations for the good of all.

  • A current, clear STD panel must be shown to Daddy before any unprotected intimacy will be considered, even if babygirl has taken a collar.
  • If possible, Daddy will ask for babygirl to get the HPV vaccine if she hasn’t already.
  • If babygirl has HSV or HIV, babygirl must be on medications and tested regularly to show it is under control and not contagious.
  • Any sexual intimacy (with or without barriers) with someone outside of the constellation must be conveyed to Daddy, intentional or not. Daddy must be able to determine next steps including a new STD panel and/or barriers added to any intimacy for a time, in order to protect himself and others who depend on him.
  • Because some diseases can take up to three months to develop, a second STD panel will be required after 3 months have passed.
  • Daddy will require a fresh, clear STD panel to be shared with him every year.
  • babygirl will keep and take ClearTract in a glass of water every day to prevent UTIs.

See https://www.reddit.com/r/polyamory/s/NQqW6AjmuO for a good discussion.

Exercise Rules

At a minimum, babygirl will grow into the following as Daddy adds each piece

  • walk 10,000 steps a day, or do 10 air squats per 1000 steps missed, in sets of at least 10
  • do a butt training routine on an a schedule adjusted by Daddy as she adapts to it
  • do a yoga routine every other day
  • do a bodyweight exercise routine 3 times per week
  • do a daily Kegels exercise routine
  • do a daily flexibility routine as provided by Daddy

Edging & Orgasm Control Rules

Schedule

  • babygirl will edge at least 3 times a day as directed and adjusted by Daddy. Daddy may pause or adjust the elements of daily edging at any time for any reason without explanation.
  • babygirl will edge at least 1 time per day exclusively to daddy’s blog for her or any of his other blogs he shares with her

Position

  • babygirl will edge in the position Daddy directs as her current default, except where he gives her specific direction for the day
  • babygirl will edge in front of a mirror, watching herself as she edges

Requirements

  • babygirl is to achieve orgasm only by Daddy’s express permission or command.
  • babygirl understands that a submissive’s orgasms are controlled for proper training, and reminding her that it is with her Daddy’s good grace that sexual pleasure is brought, providing motivation, and physical and sexual energy. Daddy will allow her this reward when he desires.

Communication Rules

Blogging

babygirl will practice putting her thought and feelings into words and sharing them on her blog, with

  • at least 5 reblogged posts a day from her time spent edging, chosen for how much they turn her on
  • at least 1 post a day with a longer comment sharing the thoughts the post provoked

expressing her needs and desires

  • babygirl will use her body, movement, clothing or lack thereof, and appearance to get Daddy's attention, and seduce him, all the time, especially when he's focused and working.
  • babygirl will use her words, and practice, develop and maintain a list of phrases to ask for what she wants and/or needs, in as sexual or dirty a way as she needs, to be accurate, honest, and sexually graphic in her descriptions of her needs, understanding that Daddy will not be moved to satisfy her needs by much less than desperate and explicit begging or wanton, shamelessly slutty statements of obsessive desire.

journaling

  • babygirl will write a daily journal entry with her thoughts on life, our relationship, our dynamic, her experience, things she's trying to learn or understand, or things she is struggling with.
  • babygirl is not required to share this entry with Daddy but must confirm by text with Daddy every time she finishes her journal entry for the day even if she doesn’t share it.

Training

Daddy will provide training routines and direction for training babygirl including, at a minimum, in anal, deepthroat, posture, commands, positions, and conditioning. Daddy will always pursue babygirl’s best interest including creating positive, beneficial experiences, and building positive associations, without coercion or pressure to actually engage in anything that babygirl is uncertain about.

​

Training activities will include domestic, professional, mental health, and relationship/soft skills training, offering of self every evening on bended knee, enthusiastic cock worship, proper answers, orgasm control, anal and deepthroat training to increase babygirl’s ability to offer every hole as Daddy wishes, learning to present herself as a submissive full of poise, grace, and beauty in public and private, learning protocols and rituals throughout this contract and as added in a separate Rules and Rituals document on an as-needed basis; and any other training activities as Daddy deems fit.

Mindfulness

Mantras

Daddy will maintain a list of mantras for babygirl, babygirl will

  • Record herself saying them and update her recording when new mantras are added
  • Listen to her current recording on repeat while edging, while falling asleep, and while sleeping
  • Read and repeat them aloud along with her recording at least once daily
    (see them, hear them, speak them, read them, all at the same time)

Meditation

  • Daddy will provide direction on developing awareness, mindfulness, centeredness, peace, stability, and the ability to focus and silence distracting thoughts.
  • Initial work will begin with the Headspace or Insight Timer app but will evolve through conversation and other assignments.

Personal Growth

Gratitude

  • babygirl will maintain a gratitude journal with a daily gratitude minute where she will write down everything she can think of in one minute that she is thankful for that day, even if it's a duplicate from a previous day.

communication 

  • babygirl will work at expressing her feelings, using her mantras as a starting point if necessary, but putting her thoughts, feelings, and desires into her own words and communicating a thought about her relationship with Daddy, or her feelings about her relationship with Daddy, or her desires in her relationship with Daddy, at least once a day.

Learning

  • Daddy will provide a reading list for babygirl with a required reading schedule and discuss what she reads with her.

Rituals

Mornings

  • babygirl will send Daddy her sleepyhead picture every morning before she gets out of bed
  • babygirl will walk for at least 3500 steps, briskly enough to break a sweat, if weather permits, and listen to a podcast or audiobook or talk with Daddy on phone
    • Daddy will provide and maintain a list of recommended podcasts

evenings

  • Daddy will add more rituals as he develops the dynamic with babygirl and track them in the Rules and Rituals document he provides for babygirl

Aftercare

from https://www.domsubliving.com/10-ways-better-aftercare/

​

babygirl to read the article and check off desires and add anything else you think of

  • provide a very soft aftercare specific blanket
  • a fresh water bottle
  • an orgasm if desired
  • check in the next day if we're not physically together
  • lay down in a comfy space with snuggles and physical touch.
  • praise
  • verbal reassurance, especially if it was rough/cnc/or any roleplay type activity that is out of character or contradictory to our actual dynamic
  • after more intense play I like to go into a more small/little headspace but only if agreed upon

Constant care

This entire contract is oriented around creating a new, and better, meaningful, and fulfilling life, making this relationship like a “life hug". However, these specific sections address areas of extra focus for Daddy and babygirl.

Tenderness

  • Daddy is not a nice person, but he works to be capable of expressing the full range of human emotions without self consciousness and can range from hard, strict, stern to kind, tender and deeply connected at a heart level, and he will work to develop such a tenderness with babygirl.

Structure and habits

  • Daddy will intentionally, thoughtfully, and incrementally create and adjust rails for babygirl to run on, with guidance, training, explanations, support, encouragement, and recognition and rewards for genuine progress and achievements.
  • Daddy will surround the rails, the structure, the routines, habits, that Daddy works with babygirl to learn and develop with guardrails, canyon walls, that create consequences for going off the rails, as needed. Consequences will be creatively designed and adjusted to be proportional and effective and will be thoroughly explained and accepted by babygirl before imposed.

Consequences

Consequences will be given for the following offenses

  • Cockiness/rudeness including disrespectful tone of voice, sarcasm, or genuine eye rolling (not negotiated bratting)
  • Disobedience
  • Incorrectly addressing Daddy
  • Failing to properly serve
  • Achieving orgasm without consent
  • Violating Daddy’s hard limits, including communication, as documented here and in his manual
  • Any other offense as dictated

Forms of consequences

  • Consequences can include spanking, nipple pinching or clamping, corner time, wall time, cropping, flogging, hair pulling, kneeling on rice, writing lines, and any other punishment as Daddy sees fit.
  • Consequences are intended as full and complete penance for offenses. They should always fit the crime and be executed with the full understanding that once over, the issue is over. The goal of all consequences is correction, not payback, and the end of a consequence wipes the slate clean with full restoration of the dynamic.
  • Consequences will always include aftercare.

Discipline And self-control

  • Daddy’s intent is to bridge the gaps in babygirl’s self-discipline and self-control with Daddy’s externally imposed discipline and control while babygirl grows into her own strength of will, character, motivation and drive to exercise these on her own more and more, in all situations, even in the face of massive external pressure from others to alter her course to please them.

Decision-making & Responsibility 

  • Daddy takes on responsibility for decision-making for babygirl within the dynamic and will work to develop babygirl’s strength in making good decisions, exercising good judgement, and sticking to her decisions with consistent followthrough. Daddy will give babygirl responsibility for areas of life to grow in and make adjustments as needed to see her become the best possible version of herself.

Mentorship and Guidance

  • Daddy will give all he is able to see babygirl thrive and grow into the most incredibly awesome babygirl and person she can be in every arena of life.

home, stability & Safety

  • Daddy will provide a port in the storm, a rock to babygirl's kite, calm, tempered, patient energy and support for babygirl. 
  • Daddy understands babygirl's broken crayons and will always work to understand even better and provide a refuge and home in his heart for her, free of judgement or condemnation. 

BDSM Survey of Limits and Interests

This section is to be completed by both Daddy and babygirl together, with discussion of each activity/kink as needed, and collects information to be summarized in the Limits & Interests section below.

Definitions of Terms

  • Never, Daddy: a hard limit, something babygirl has an aversion to. Daddy will honor these hard limits, though, if any of them are a kink of his, or become one of his kinks, he may share his thoughts and reasons for his interest, especially on his blog. This does not mean babygirl is ever expected to participate.
  • Ick: something babygirl doesn’t like, even really dislikes, but will consider and may even, in time, do for Daddy if it’s important to him
  • Tolerate: babygirl has no desire to do this, but does not have a particular aversion to it.  Something she would do, however, to please Daddy.
  • Intrigued: babygirl thinks that she would probably like the activity, could be something that is an enjoyable fantasy, but babygirl is not sure it will translate into an enjoyable real life activity. Also could be something babygirl wants but is embarrassed about wanting.
  • Exciting: babygirl is quite sure that this activity is something that she would like to do, perhaps a reoccurring fantasy and/or something that she has often done in the past and enjoyed.
  • A Must!: babygirl finds this activity a wild turn on and has a particular fetish or preoccupation with it.

SURVEY Instructions

  • Daddy: Put a “DG” (Daddy Giving) or “DR” (Daddy Receiving) in the appropriate columns
  • babygirl: Put a “bg” (babygirl giving) or “br” (babygirl receiving) in the appropriate columns

Limits & Interests

This section documents the final negotiated limits and interests derived from the BDSM Survey above as well as personal knowledge and ongoing conversation.

NONNEGOTIABLE HARD LIMITS FROM DADDY

  • No acts involving fire play
  • No acts involving defecation and the products thereof
  • No acts involving needles, knives, guns, cutting, piercing, or blood
  • No acts involving children or animals
  • No acts that will leave any permanent marks on the skin (except for negotiated tattoos)
  • No acts that will cause permanent damage or alteration of the body (except for negotiated piercings)
  • No acts involving breath control (asphyxiation)
  • No activity that involves the direct contact of electric current (whether alternating or direct), fire or flames to the body.

1Additional concerns
​
2Any allergies that Daddy should be aware? (if yes, describe:)
I'm allergic to sulfa medications and cheap nickel but nothing crazy
3Any medical conditions? (if yes, give details:)
I have a low functioning gallbladder, was 20% on my hydascan when I was 19. Dr. said if it doesnt hurt no need for surgery. This causes my liver enzymes to be elevated but Dr. said not anything concerning will improve with weight loss. Polycystic kidneys and ovaries run in my family and I had some but not a concerning amount at last ultrasound a few years ago. The regular anxiety/ depression diagnosis everyone gets. Knee pain occasionally, plantar faciitis and synovitis in my hand when overused. Never had a surgery.
4Any specific subject not described in this list that Daddy should be concerned with? (if yes, describe:)
Don't think so

Session Negotiation

Formal D/s play sessions activities and boundaries will be negotiated separately on an session-by-session basis, using https://www.evilmonk.org/a/wiseman10.cfm as a starting point, but may be ad hoc within the limits negotiated, or assigned to babygirl to plan as a request in written and/or visual form.

Termination

To end the dynamic with Daddy, take off and return his collar(s).

​

Daddy may end the dynamic at any time by requesting his collar(s) be returned.

  • If you take Daddy's collar off
    • you are declaring your independence 
    • you are no longer his
    • unless you were friends with Daddy long before you became his babygirl, Daddy will probably not remain in your life as a friend
    • Daddy will very likely not become a friend with benefits, only collared babygirls get to play, with rare exceptions
      • You will most likely not get to stay with daddy at his house or in his bed
    • There will be no kinky talk or flirting
    • There will be no kissing, caressing, cuddling, holding you, or sexual touch, hugs are the limit
    • Daddy will not express wishes/feelings towards you anymore, wishing to hold you, or claim you
  • What you should think about before you take Daddy's collar off
    • Daddy may never put it back on you, especially if you took it off in anger
    • You are telling Daddy you are not his and will no longer visibly identify as his, that you no longer want his care or guidance or leadership and responsibility for choices 
    • If you’re not openly and visibly Daddy’s, there will be no physical intimacy
  • Why you should take Daddy's collar off anyway 
    • It's not a failure: not everyone is actually a sub, and even subs are not always necessarily in a good place to start a new dynamic, and Daddy tends to be very effective at flushing these things out
    • Not right now doesn't necessarily mean never, it can just mean not yet

Requirements

  • Upon termination, each of us agrees to offer the other their reasons and openly assess the new needs and situation. This agreement shall serve as the basis and starting point for extending our relationship, and we are committed to the spirit of loving and consensual Dominance and submission to further self-awareness and exploration, promote health and happiness, and improve both lives. We both understand that cancellation means a cessation of the power exchange dynamic indicated and implied within this agreement, not a termination of any pre-existing relationship as friends or other forms, and does not preclude any evolution of our relationship into some other form.
  • Each of us agrees to timely, reasonable effort to return property owned by the other.
  • Each of us agrees to continue to protect each other’s privacy and reputation and to not disparage the other, especially in any public fashion. This does not mean that conversation and seeking counsel from close, trusted friends is off limits. This means friends who themselves aren’t prone to reactivity and gossip.

Returning to Daddy

Daddy will always prefer remaining friendly, civil, and parting ways in peace if you have to or choose to return your collar.

​

If you discover you regret the end of your dynamic with Daddy, you may possibly find your way back to Daddy if you ever want to.

  • If you left Daddy for what you consider cause, Daddy’s going to always be looking to grow, to do better, to own his shit. If he was at fault, he’s going to work to learn from it and make changes for the better
    • You may or may not be willing to believe this or trust that anything has changed, but staying in contact with Daddy and constantly attacking him or accusing him of making the same mistakes again, or of lacking integrity, will just lead to no more contact.
  • If you ever want to come back to Daddy, you’re still going to have to come back into a dynamic, with a heart that says “Daddy, what do I need to do to come back?”, despite whatever Daddy did, which means
    • Forgiving Daddy for anything you’re holding against him.
    • Trusting Daddy again, or choosing to work at rebuilding trust, not because he's perfect, superhuman, flawless, incapable of error, but because you believe in his heart and choose to be loyal not because he's already arrived, but because of where he's going.
    • Accepting Daddy is human and imperfect and can make mistakes, even huge ones, and deciding to forgive him and not live in constant, recurring recriminations, accusations, suspicion, and fault finding.
    • Accepting that Daddy is not going to stop being Daddy, that someone has to call the shots and make the decisions and that in Daddy’s world, that’s going to be Daddy.
    • Deciding whether choosing Daddy and submitting to him again is worth the risk of being hurt again, a decision no one else can make for you, but realizing that constantly finding fault with Daddy out of your unresolved hurt is not going to build a new, healthy dynamic, but instead destroy it in its infancy every time it starts to get some traction and grow
      • Daddy will not maintain constant contact, connection, availability, and support for and with a babygirl who refuses to be his.
  • Why would Daddy take you back?
    • Because he loves you.

babygirl's commitment

I, Ciara Bennett (babygirl), request of Daddy the acceptance of my submission as his babygirl. I grant ownership of my mind, body, and soul, and accept his care and protection of my own free will, with an open heart. Through this agreement, we may strengthen our bond and increase intimacy. 

​

Out of a desire to express my love and devotion to Daddy, I offer myself in service and use of my body and mind to my Daddy indefinitely, with the understanding that I may call for a meta conversation at any time, pause and/or suspend the dynamic, and negotiate an adjustment to this contract to be added as an addendum, or simply end the dynamic and execute the termination clause.

​

I freely and completely relinquish all freedom to Daddy in a structured relationship in order to satisfy my need to serve and obey Daddy. I vow to provide my body to fulfill Daddy's every need. Use, control, and requirements of my body will be at Daddy's discretion. 

​

I have read and understand Daddy’s vision for me and for our dynamic as expressed in his writings on what it means to be his, and I understand that this is merely a starting point that will be tailored to me and to our dynamic as Daddy sees fit in order to take utmost care of my needs and to maximize his pleasure.

​

I have discussed Daddy’s vision for what it means to be his and asked for the following adjustments for our dynamic:

  • None

I have read and understand and agree to honor Daddy’s limits and guidance as communicated in his manual to him and understand that there will be additions and changes at times, and that I will always be free to consider any such additions and changes and discuss them with Daddy, negotiate, and work towards a new common ground and agreement.

​

I have discussed Daddy’s manual and have asked for the following adjustments for our dynamic:

​

  • None

During the time period expressed above, I will devote myself completely and totally to the pleasure and desires of my Daddy, seeking to please and be pleasing to Daddy without hesitation or consideration or concern for myself or others. I will trust Daddy to consider my needs as well as the needs of others in my life and guide and direct me in all my relationships. I understand that Daddy will seek to deeply understand every area of my life before giving any direction in that area in order to treat my needs with the utmost seriousness. I will support him in this endeavor by sharing everything he needs to know to make good decisions for me, and I will not withhold any relevant information he needs to do so. I will strive daily to better serve Daddy's needs and accept His guidance along this journey.

​

I will do my best to serve my Daddy. I will work hard to correct any insecurities or inhibitions that interfere with my capability to serve Daddy. I will grow as a person. I will maintain honest and open communication. I will reveal my thoughts, feelings, and desires without fear of judgment or embarrassment. I will bring any wants and perceived needs of mine to Daddy. I will not hold past mistakes against Daddy while I remain collared.

​

My surrender as a submissive is done with the knowledge that nothing asked of me will demean me as a person and in no way diminish my responsibilities toward making the utmost use of my potential. In recognition of my family obligations, I know nothing will be required of me that will damage or harm my family relationships or interfere with my duties as a daughter, sister, aunt, or any other role within my family.

​

I agree that I will derive my own pleasures from accepting my part in the relationship described in the Creed, Roles, and Rules sections and I will gladly accept the pleasures Daddy provides. I further agree to confess my desires for Daddy's consideration. Failing to do so, Daddy takes no responsibility in the consequences of the babygirl's failure to disclose desires, even if babygirl is unable or unwilling to communicate her desires.

​

I will obey Daddy at all times and will wholeheartedly seek his pleasure and well-being above all other considerations.

​

I trust that Daddy will provide guidance during scenes that helps me grow as a submissive and during and throughout all of my life to spur my growth as a person.

​

I renounce all rights to pursue my own pleasure, comfort, or gratification, except insofar as Daddy desires or permits them, or directs me to do so.

​

I will strive diligently to re-mold my body, my habits, my mindset, and my attitudes in accordance with Daddy's desires. I will adapt my physical, emotional and mental attitudes to the best of my ability. I agree to change my visible actions and speech to express my changed habits and attitudes as Daddy directs and guides me.

​

I will seek always to learn how to please Daddy better, and will gracefully accept criticism, guidance, and correction within the negotiated boundaries of the Limits & Interests section.

​

Whether together or separated, I surrender control of my sexual pleasure and physical and emotional comfort to Daddy. Additionally, I agree that no secrets shall be kept from Daddy, all questions will be answered honestly and privacy must be granted to me by Daddy. I understand that Daddy will seek to honor my needs for privacy in areas where I communicate that need, but that I must communicate that need when it is germane. It is therefore my responsibility to voice all fantasies, limits, feelings and needs without hesitance to Daddy and to work with Daddy to eliminate mental hurdles that may prevent such communication. I renounce all rights to privacy or concealment from Daddy. I will answer truthfully and completely, to the best of my knowledge, any and all questions Daddy may ask me, within the negotiated boundaries of the Limits & Interests section of this contract and any negotiated sessions.

​

I understand and agree that any failure by me to comply fully with Daddy's desires shall be regarded as sufficient cause for possibly severe consequences. I understand that Daddy will communicate any planned consequences beforehand, seeking to customize them to be proportional and appropriate to the offense and to be effective in correcting behavior. I accept any consequence that Daddy sees fit should I fail to uphold this contract and meet Daddy's expectations.

​

Within the limits of physical safety, my ability to earn a livelihood, and limiting impacts to my relationships with family and friends, I otherwise unconditionally accept as Daddy's prerogative anything He may choose to do with me, whether as a consequence, for His amusement, or for whatever purpose, no matter how painful or embarrassing to myself. I entrust my best interests into Daddy’s hands and his judgement and subject to his decisions. I grant ownership of my mind, body and soul with the understanding that my physical, emotional and mental safety will be cared for. Risk of life or livelihood allows for termination of this contract.

​

Should the need to revise the contract arise before any agreed expiration date, I agree to call for a meta conversation and to verbally negotiate with Daddy in good faith, with the intent of pursuing a resolution and a path forward for the relationship, working together on the relationship, not falling to personal attacks, and to do so from a place of calm, rational thoughtfulness, or to take the space I need to get to a place of calm before beginning or continuing the conversation.

Daddy's commitment

Of my own free will and out of desire to guide, protect, lead and enjoy babygirl, I accept her gift of submission.

​

During the time period expressed above, I will diligently consider and take action to benefit babygirl in her personal, professional, mental, emotional, psychological, and sexual lives.

​

I will diligently work to honor her hard limits as well as her goals.

​

I am committed to protecting her health and privacy.

  • I won’t have sexual contact with anyone that hasn’t been tested.
  • I won’t have sexual contact with someone before they are collared.
  • I’m not going to tell every babygirl everything about every other babygirl and about every instance of physical intimacy, however, I will follow through on commitments, so 
    • If I committed to babygirl, specifically, that I would tell her before someone was collared, she can be confident I haven’t had sex with someone that she hasn’t heard about, at least that they exist.
    • If I told babygirl that she’s showing an unacceptable level of instability and insecurity when I even mention minor things about another babygirl and that I will not be discussing other babygirls until she makes progress, clear progress, potentially including time with a therapist, then she may not get to know about anything for a period of time.
    • If she then goes searching for information about another babygirl and finds one and then proceeds to make problems, especially if she tries to drive her away, there will be no discussion, she will be gone from Daddy’s life.
  • I will be uncompromising about seeing a copy of a clean test result
    • Which means I need to see one from babygirl
    • I will not be sharing babygirl’s results with anyone else
    • I’m not sharing any one else’s with babygirl
  • Condoms are an option but they are not very compatible
    • Daddy focuses on so many layers during kinky play sessions that his mental focus can lower his arousal at points and an erection can come and go, condoms can be tried but are often wasted.

babygirl's Creed

  • I will communicate with complete honesty my needs, desires, limits, and experience. I realize that failing to do so will not only prevent my Daddy and I from having the best experience possible, but can also lead to consequences as well as unintentional physical and emotional harm.
  • I will not try to manipulate or manage my Daddy. I will not push to make a scene go the way I feel it should. I will not attempt to control outcomes by withholding information from Daddy. In other words, I will not top from the bottom.
  • I will keep an open mind about trying things that I am not comfortable with and expanding my limits. I will continue to grow as a submissive babygirl and as a human being.
  • I will accept the responsibility of discovering what pleases my Daddy, and will do my best to fulfill his wishes and desires, including working to understand what pleases him, to consistently practice and train, and to work hard to be the best babygirl I can be.
  • I will not allow myself to be harmed or abused. I know that submissive does not equal doormat.
  • Where I have contact or interaction, I will be courteous and helpful to my fellow submissives. I will share my knowledge and experience with others in the hope that they will learn and benefit from where I have been. I will take the time to help those new to the scene start out on the correct path.
  • I will be responsive to my Daddy. I will not try to hide what my mind and body are feeling so that I may assist him in his responsibilities as my authority. I know that Daddies are not telepaths, and will not expect my Daddy to know thoughts or feelings which I do not share.
  • I will accept a share in the responsibility of a scene or relationship gone bad. I will not place total blame on my Daddy when it is not warranted simply because he is Daddy. I realize that things may not work out as they should at times, and will do my best to put it behind me and move on.
  • I will give my gift of submission only to those that can responsibly accept and desire to receive. I will not place anyone in the position of Topping me non-consensually, nor will I give my respect to someone that has not earned it.
  • I know that D/s is not a contest, and will never think myself a "better" submissive because I choose to submit on a different level than another. I will not be boastful of the experiences I have had as a bottom.
  • I will be obedient to my Daddy even if I disagree with what he is requesting. I realize he has my best interests at heart and often knows better than I what I need in a particular situation.
  • I know that my actions reflect upon my Daddy, and will do my best to help others see him in a positive way. I will not intentionally embarrass or displease my Daddy.
  • Above all, I will wear my title of submissive babygirl with honor. I will never cause others to think that being submissive means to be weak or sub-human. I will take pride in who and what I am and will never show myself in a negative way.

Agreement

We, the undersigned, have read and understood fully the provisions of this contract. We freely accept the terms of this contract and have acknowledged this by our signatures below. 

babygirl

With my signature below, i agree to accept and obey all preceding rules as well as any rules my Daddy may choose to issue at a later date. i gratefully consign by mind, body, and soul to my Daddy for His pleasure and use for the contract period noted above. i will take and wear Daddy’s collar with pride continuously as a visible sign of my continued agreement.

​

​

________________________________

​

With my signature below, I accept My babygirl's desire to serve Me more fully, and have me take responsibility for her well-being, training and discipline to more perfectly serve My will and thrive and excel in all of life. I will provide babygirl with a collar from my hand as a recognition of her commitment to me.

Permanent collar

Choosing to pursue a lifetime commitment to and from Daddy is no light matter. Over the next 18-24 months, especially, you and Daddy will come to know and understand each other deeply. If you come to see your future as uncompromisingly being with Daddy, this is something to bring up to Daddy and discuss with him. The contract as well as the provisions

Slavery vs. Submission

Many people in the BDSM scene use the terms "slave" and "submissive" interchangeably (as they use "master" and "dominant".)

​

However, for many of us there is an important distinction between being a slave and being a submissive.

Slave

  • In the larger world, "a person held in servitude as the chattel of another" or "one that is completely subservient to a dominating influence." (Merriam-Webster Dictionary)
  • In the scene, someone who has freely and completely relinquished all freedom to a specific person or persons in a structured relationship in order to satisfy their need to serve another. Some consider it is fantasy role playing. Others are quite outspoken in their belief that it is real. (Slave is often written in all lower case.)
  • In The Leatherman's Handbook, Larry Townsend defines a slave as "a man who's need for total mastery over him leads him to enter into a state of voluntary servitude." In Ask Larry, Mr. Townsend adds "a slave obeys his master, even when he doesn't want to obey" (p. 254) and "a real slave is just that: the complete and unquestioned property of his Master. So long as you maintain that you are a slave, you have no recourse. Your Master's word is law!" (p. 259) [But I need to also point out that Mr. Townsend doesn't believe that the Master doesn't have his own obligations. In Ask Larry, he writes "If you accept a slave and make him subservient to your control, you must assume responsibility for his well-being." (p. 301)]

Submissive (or Sub)

(n.) In the scene, a person that prefers to give up control to a dominant in the course of a scene or in their relationship. The term is often written in all lower case where dominant is often capitalized.

​

While many submissives fantasize about consensual slavery, few are naturally disposed for it. That doesn't imply a weakness of character.

​

Slavery as defined here is not something to which to aspire. It is not a choice. It is a vocation -- a calling which provides a psychological or spiritual need.

​

For the sake of simplicity, this article will use the terms submissive and slave -- as well as master and dominant — interchangeably.

Suggestions

  • Don't enter into a slave contract lightly or without a complete understanding of what it entails. Would you move in with someone you've only known on-line? Would you marry a person after a single date?
  • Start with a trial contract -- temporary contract with a limited scope and time period -- or a series of trial contracts. Over time, graduate to longer and more demanding contracts.
  • D/s is a fantasy and it should be a mutually fulfilling fantasy. babygirl must recognize and acknowledge that he or she has needs that need to be meet -- and articulate them as best babygirl can.
  • If a slave's needs are unfulfilled in a slave contract -- and the master cannot or will not address babygirl's concerns in a reasonable period of time -- then babygirl can break the contract -- no matter what it stipulates. (It's in the master's interest to recognize this.)
  • A submissive might fantasize about slavery but that doesn't mean slavery is appropriate for that submissive. That doesn't make babygirl a dilettante.
  • Slave contracts abound on the Internet. But it's advisable to view them as reference material when writing your own instead of adopting one without alteration. Select the elements that are relevant to your situation and discard what doesn't apply.
